## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the architectural context of this implementation.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Architectural Justification

Please explain the reasoning behind any core architectural decisions made in this PR (e.g. choice of state management, data structures, concurrency, or security controls).

## Self-Check Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style and naming conventions of this project.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] I have verified that all sensitive values/secrets have been scrubbed.
